title: Appliance Donation Programs - 211info
text: - Radius - 5 Miles 10 Miles 25 Miles 50 Miles 100 Miles Search by Provider Name > New Search > Volunteering & Donating > Appliance Donation Programs 6 Matching Service Providers Print & Share All Results X Print & Share Print PDF BEND-REDMOND HABITAT FOR HUMANITY RESTORE Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Sells donated new and reclaimed building materials, pre-owned furniture and appliances, and a variety of home improvement items. Proceeds from sales support building homes. Accepts donations of building materials, cabinets, doors and windows, flooring, lighting, plumbing, tools, furniture and home decor, appliances, and miscellaneous items. Pickup is available for items that do not fit in a passenger vehicle. 224 NE Thurston Avenue Bend, OR 97701 Eligibility: Unrestricted Hours: Store: Monday-Saturday 9am-6pm Donations: Monday-Saturday 9am-5pm, Sunday 11am-3pm Email (541) 548-1406 Get Directions Visit Website More Details FURNITURE SHARE Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides used furniture, kitchen, household goods, and food boxes. Accepts furniture, kitchen, and household goods donations. Limited donation pick up is available. 4550 Marion Steet SE Suite C Albany, OR 97322 Eligibility: Low-income households Hours: Furniture Distribution: Monday-Thursday 9am-noon and 1pm-4pm Furniture Drop Off: Friday 9am-4pm Furniture Pickup: Monday-Thursday 9am-noon and 1pm-4pm Email (541) 754-9511 Get Directions Visit Website More Details ROGUE VALLEY HABITAT FOR HUMANITY MEDFORD RESTORE RESTORE Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Sells donated new and reclaimed building materials, pre-owned furniture and appliances, and a variety of home improvement items. Proceeds from sales help build Habitat for Humanity homes for local low-income families. Accepts new and reclaimed building materials, furniture, and appliances in good working condition. 2233 S Pacific Highway Medford, OR 97501 Eligibility: Unrestricted Hours: ReStore Hours: Monday-Saturday 9am-5pm Donation drop off: Tuesday/Friday/Saturday 10am-4pm (541) 773-9095 Get Directions Visit Website More Details SOUTH LINCOLN RESOURCES APPLIANCES, FURNITURE, AND DURABLE MEDICAL EQUIPMENT Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides previously used durable medical equipment, such as hospital beds, wheelchairs, walkers, crutches, canes, commodes, and toilet risers, as well as furniture and appliances. Donations are accepted. 3710 Crestline Drive Waldport, OR 97394 Eligibility: Unrestricted Hours: January-October: Tuesday noon-2pm or by appointment November-December: By appointment only Email (541) 563-3710 Get Directions Visit Website More Details ST VINCENT DE PAUL OF LANE COUNTY RECYCLING AND MANUFACTURING Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Accepts donations of electronics (desktop computers, laptops, computer accessories, televisions, monitors, mobile phones, video game systems, etc.), books, clothing, furniture, and electric appliances (refrigerators, ranges, freezers, washers, and dryers). Also provides recycling of mattresses and styrofoam. 2890 Chad Drive Eugene, OR 97408 Eligibility: Unrestricted Hours: No standard hours Email (541) 687-5820 Get Directions Visit Website More Details TILLAMOOK COUNTY HABITAT FOR HUMANITY TILLAMOOK RESTORE Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Sells donated new and reclaimed building materials, pre-owned furniture and appliances, plus a wide variety of home improvement items. Donations are accepted and pickup is available. 4192 Highway 101 N Tillamook, OR 97141 Eligibility: Unrestricted Hours: ReStore: Wednesday-Saturday 10am-5pm Donations: Wednesday-Saturday 10am-4pm, Monday/Tuesday by appointment only Email (503) 377-0204 Get Directions Visit Website More Details BEND-REDMOND HABITAT FOR HUMANITY RESTORE FURNITURE SHARE FURNITURE SHARE ROGUE VALLEY HABITAT FOR HUMANITY RESTORE SOUTH LINCOLN RESOURCES APPLIANCES, FURNITURE, AND DURABLE MEDICAL EQUIPMENT ST VINCENT DE PAUL OF LANE COUNTY RECYCLING AND MANUFACTURING TILLAMOOK COUNTY HABITAT FOR HUMANITY TILLAMOOK RESTORE
